name: multaiplayer
description: Private group chat for coding with Codex. Open source.

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @multaiplayer/protocol && npm run build -w @multaiplayer/crypto && npm run build -w @multaiplayer/codex && npm run build -w @multaiplayer/git && npm run build -w @multaiplayer/github
scripts.build:apps: npm run build -w @multaiplayer/relay && npm run build -w @multaiplayer/desktop
scripts.check: npm run build:packages && npm run check --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage:packages && npm run test:coverage -w @multaiplayer/relay
scripts.test:coverage:packages: npm run test:coverage -w @multaiplayer/crypto && npm run test:coverage -w @multaiplayer/protocol && npm run test:coverage -w @multaiplayer/codex && npm run test:coverage -w @multaiplayer/git && npm run test:coverage -w @multaiplayer/github
scripts.test: npm run build:packages && npm run test:scripts && npm run test:workspaces
scripts.verify:web: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run build:packages && npm run test:scripts && npm run test:workspaces && npm run build:apps
scripts.verify:native: npm run fmt:rust:check && npm run lint:rust && npm run test:native
scripts.verify: npm run verify:web && npm run verify:native
scripts.release:preflight: npm run doctor && npm run license:check && npm run sqlite:backup-restore-drill && npm run verify
